title: Opening Ceremony
description: Kick off Frosh Week in style! Welcome speeches, a surprise performance, and your very first taste of what it means to be part of this university family.

title: Welcome BBQ on the Front Campus
description: Fuel up with burgers, hot dogs, and veggie options while meeting your frosh leaders and future classmates. Bring your appetite and your best icebreaker.

title: Campus-Wide Scavenger Hunt
description: Race across campus in teams, solve clues, and discover hidden gems you'll be using for the next four years. First place wins bragging rights and a prize pack.

title: Faculty Mixer & Program Info Session
description: Meet professors, upper-year students, and your future study squad. Learn about your program, clubs, and resources — and figure out where the best coffee is on campus.

title: Tie-Dye & Chill
description: Express yourself by tie-dyeing your own Frosh t-shirt. All supplies provided — just show up and get colourful with your crew.

title: Clubs & Societies Fair
description: Over 50 student clubs in one place — from hackathon teams to dance crews to debate societies. Come curious, leave with ten new sign-up sheets.

title: Frosh Trivia Night
description: Think you know your pop culture, history, and campus trivia? Assemble a team of six and compete for the coveted Frosh Trivia Trophy (a very large foam trophy).

title: Morning Yoga & Wellness Walk
description: Start your last Frosh day grounded with a guided outdoor yoga session followed by a mindful walk through Queen's Park. Mats provided — just bring yourself.

title: Pancake Breakfast & Tradition Ceremony
description: A Frosh Week tradition — stack your plate high and watch upper years pass down the purple torch in a ceremony that's equal parts heartfelt and chaotic.

title: Closing Carnival & Fireworks
description: Send off Frosh Week with carnival games, live music, food trucks, and a fireworks finale. This is the one — don't miss it.
